# FlipVertical2

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FlipVertical2 icon">

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FlipVertical2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FlipVertical2 { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
reflect, mirror, alignment, dashed

## Categories
design, photography

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/flip-vertical-2)
